[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0010000100 2
3 0000000000 a
4 0000001010 2
5 1000001000 2
6 0011001100 4
7 0111100111 7

01 10 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
12 21 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
23 32 0010001000 2
34 43 0010001100 3
45 54 0100001100 3
56 65 0000011001 3
67 76 1000001001 3
70 07 0011000101 4

02 20 0010000010 2
13 31 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
24 42 0010001000 2
35 53 0000001100 2
46 64 0000001000 1
57 75 0000001101 3
60 06 0000000001 1
71 17 0000000000 a match 0 1 3

03 30 0010000100 2 match 2
14 41 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
25 52 0000001010 2 match 4
36 63 1000001000 2 match 5
47 74 0011001100 4 match 6
50 05 0100000111 4
61 16 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
72 27 0010001000 2

04 40 0111000100 4
15 51 0000000000 a match 0 1 3
26 62 0000001000 1
37 73 1010001100 4
[completion]
